description: Known error patterns and fix strategies for self-healing

patterns.error_example: ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'requests'
patterns.fix_strategy: pip install ${1}

patterns.error_example: ImportError: cannot import name 'foo' from 'bar'
patterns.fix_strategy: pip install --upgrade ${2}

patterns.error_example:
File "main.py", line 42
    SyntaxError: invalid syntax
patterns.fix_strategy: Read file at line ${2}, identify and fix the syntax error

patterns.error_pattern: IndentationError: (unexpected indent|expected an indented block|unindent does not match).*File "([^"]+)", line (\d+)
patterns.error_example:
File "main.py", line 10
    IndentationError: unexpected indent
patterns.fix_strategy: Read file at line ${3}, fix indentation to match surrounding code

patterns.error_pattern: TypeError: ([\w_]+)\(\) (got an unexpected keyword argument|missing \d+ required positional argument|takes \d+ positional arguments? but \d+ (?:was|were) given)
patterns.error_example: TypeError: foo() got an unexpected keyword argument 'bar'
patterns.fix_strategy: Read the function signature for ${1}, fix the call site to match

patterns.error_pattern: FileNotFoundError: \[Errno 2\] No such file or directory: '([^']+)'
patterns.error_example: FileNotFoundError: [Errno 2] No such file or directory: 'config.json'
patterns.fix_strategy: Check if parent directory exists. Create it with mkdir -p if needed. If the file should exist, check for typos in the path.

patterns.error_example: PermissionError: [Errno 13] Permission denied: '/usr/local/bin/thing'
patterns.fix_strategy: chmod +x ${1} or run with appropriate permissions

patterns.error_pattern: ConnectionError:.*(?:Connection refused|Failed to establish a new connection|Max retries exceeded)
patterns.error_example: ConnectionError: HTTPConnectionPool(host='localhost', port=8000): Max retries exceeded
patterns.fix_strategy: Check if the target service is running. Retry after 2 seconds.

patterns.error_example: json.decoder.JSONDecodeError: Expecting value: line 1 column 1 (char 0)
patterns.fix_strategy: Read the JSON file, find the syntax error at the reported position, fix it

patterns.error_example: KeyError: 'username'
patterns.fix_strategy: Find the dict access, use .get('${1}') or add the missing key

patterns.error_example: Error: Cannot find module 'express'
patterns.fix_strategy: npm install ${1}

patterns.error_example: SyntaxError: Unexpected token '{' at main.js:15:3
patterns.fix_strategy: Read ${2} at line ${3}, fix the JavaScript syntax error

patterns.error_example: TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'map')
patterns.fix_strategy: Add null check or optional chaining before the property access

patterns.error_example: Error: ENOENT: no such file or directory, open 'config.json'
patterns.fix_strategy: mkdir -p $(dirname ${1}) && touch ${1}

patterns.error_example: Error: EACCES: permission denied, access '/usr/local/lib'
patterns.fix_strategy: Fix permissions on ${1} or use a user-local path instead

patterns.error_example: Error: connect ECONNREFUSED 127.0.0.1:5432
patterns.fix_strategy: Check if service at ${1} is running. Start it or update the connection config.

patterns.error_example: Error: listen EADDRINUSE: address already in use :::3000
patterns.fix_strategy: lsof -ti:${1} | xargs kill -9

patterns.error_example: CONFLICT (content): Merge conflict in src/main.py
patterns.fix_strategy: Read ${1}, resolve merge conflict markers, keep the correct version

patterns.error_pattern: error: You are not currently on a branch
patterns.error_example:
error: You are not currently on a branch.
To push the history leading to the current (detached HEAD) state now, use
    git push origin HEAD:<name-of-remote-branch>
patterns.fix_strategy: git checkout -b temp-branch-$(date +%s)

patterns.error_pattern: error: Your local changes to the following files would be overwritten by checkout
patterns.error_example:
error: Your local changes to the following files would be overwritten by checkout:
	src/main.py
Please commit your changes or stash them before you switch branches.
patterns.fix_strategy: git stash

patterns.error_pattern: (?:address already in use|bind: address already in use).*:(\d+)
patterns.error_example: bind: address already in use :8080
patterns.fix_strategy: lsof -ti:${1} | xargs kill -9

patterns.error_example: OSError: [Errno 28] No space left on device
patterns.fix_strategy: df -h to check disk usage, then clean caches: npm cache clean --force, pip cache purge, docker system prune -f

patterns.error_pattern: (?:MemoryError|JavaScript heap out of memory|ENOMEM|Cannot allocate memory)
patterns.error_example: FATAL ERROR: CALL_AND_RETRY_LAST Allocation failed - JavaScript heap out of memory
patterns.fix_strategy: For Node: set NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096. For Python: reduce batch size or use generators.

patterns.error_example: Error: This request would exceed the context window limit of 200000 tokens
patterns.fix_strategy: Reduce input size: truncate context, summarize long content, split into chunks

patterns.error_example: RateLimitError: Rate limit exceeded. Please retry after 60 seconds.
patterns.fix_strategy: sleep 60 && retry the command

patterns.error_example: Error: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY environment variable is not set
patterns.fix_strategy: Check .env and shell profile for the API key. Cannot fix automatically -- requires user to set the key.
